ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Continued To Sep-22-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, NA, a corporation.
Mark Poliner, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Peter Han.
Default entered on August 27, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed on August 27, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Peter Han as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32,665.39.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,278.49.
Costs = $408.00, for a total of $37,351.88.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
